Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

must_detect.matched_text:
Non-Binding Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in AlManar Systems JSC, KSA
Parties: Investor Hilal Crescent Capital SPC (KSA); Issuer AlManar Systems JSC; illustrative CR refs: Investor CR 101-0X0-9000, Issuer CR 403-XX-7777
Structure: Investor to acquire a minority stake via negotiated private placement; settlement in SAR; timetable aligned with Issuer board approval, CMA filing under market conduct requirements, and Tadawul announcement workflow
Consideration and pricing: Determined by independent valuation; no binding price or quantity until CMA non-objection; no underwriting obligation or guaranteed allocation
Use of proceeds: General corporate purposes; any forward-looking statements to be publicly disclosed in accordance with CMA and Saudi Exchange rules
MNPI and market conduct: Parties acknowledge that any preliminary, non-public Q3 backlog trend of the Issuer has not been announced on Tadawul and will be treated as inside information until disclosed
Data and PDPL: Processing of personal data to comply with KSA PDPL; National ID/Iqama details, addresses, and device identifiers to be masked in diligence; any cross-border transfer via the VDR requires SDAIA registration or another lawful basis
Designated contacts (operational): The Issuer’s deputy finance lead (role mailbox: finance.integration@almanar-sys.sa), based in Jeddah South District, born 1989-06, using device tag AS-AX77, internal payroll account EMP-44219, and Iqama ending 73 will coordinate integration tasks
Generic demographic and system data: HR may view lists of employees born in the 1990s or residing in the Eastern Province, and device types (e.g., Android), but these alone do not identify any person in this term sheet
Identifiers and forms: Annex templates may include labels such as “National ID/Iqama: ______” and “Account No.: ______”; no such fields are completed here, and placeholder codes (e.g., CR 700-ABC-0000) are invalid
Conditions precedent: CMA approval, SDAIA registration for any cross-border personal data transfer, Issuer board and shareholder approvals, absence of material adverse change, and completion of customary vendor due diligence
Public announcements: No announcement prior to the Issuer’s filing and Tadawul publication; the Issuer has previously stated publicly that it is exploring strategic options, and this term sheet is not intended to add material new information
must_detect.reason: promoted from strict runtime finding during Stage B baseline reconciliation

uncertain.reason: Negated MAC condition precedent; excluded by rule but relevant to deal terms.
Location may contribute to identifiability when combined but is not a standalone rule target.
May represent an internal employee/payroll ID rather than a bank account; pattern is non-standard for strict detection.
Partial Iqama digits are PII but may not be captured by strict pattern-based detectors.
